text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: AbbVie’s mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that address complex health issues and enhance people’s lives.

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: A Closer Look at Our Impact

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: AbbVie’s commitment to and progress on environmental, social and governance goals are outlined in this comprehensive 2025 report.

cta.aria-label: Download ESG report Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: See highlights from the past 10 years through our growth as a company and impact with patients, science, jobs, and communities.

cta_961711701.aria-label: Download the impact report Opens in same window
cta_961711701.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: For more information on AbbVie’s financial performance download the 2025 Annual Report.

cta_997300890.aria-label: Download the annual report Opens in same window
cta_997300890.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: partnerships with leading biotechs, universities, nonprofits and government organizations to advance science

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: raised for ~13,000 nonprofit organizations through our Employee Giving Campaign

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: blockbuster products with 2025 net revenues greater than $1B

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
compounds, devices or indications
in development individually
or under collaboration or license

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
~74 million patients reached
with AbbVie products in 2025

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: *Adjusted R&D investment is a non-GAAP measure, which is reconciled in our 2026 Proxy Statement

text_container_text_0.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text_0.text: We’ve been honored to receive some of the most prestigious ratings and recognitions in the industry, including being named on more than 40 great workplace and diversity and inclusion lists.

accordion_2.blockHeading: External recognition as a top company
accordion_2.name: Accordion

accordion_item_0.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_0.text:
• Newsweek’s Most Trustworthy Companies in America 2025
  • Workplace & Diversity: FORTUNE 100 Best Companies to Work For®
  • Workplace & Diversity: Great Place to Work's World's Best Workplaces™
  • People's 100 Companies that Care

accordion_item_1.name: Accordion Item
accordion_item_1.text:
• EcoVadis Corporate Social Responsibility Assessment Silver Medal
  • FTSE4Good Index
  • UN Global Compact Member
  • Just Capital's 2026 Rankings
  • 3BL's 100 Best Corporate Citizens
  • USA Today's America's Climate Leaders List
